supported_devices: LED grow lights, inline fans, clip fans, humidifiers, dehumidifiers, drip irrigation, heat mats, heaters, general AC devices (2 customizable outlets)
compatible_ec_fans: Mars Hydro iFresh fans (smart speed control via RJ12 labeled ports); other fans (on/off via AC outlets)
compatible_lights: Mars Hydro FC, FC-E, TS, SP3000, SP3000R, ADlite100 series (dimming via RJ12 labeled light ports); any AC grow light (on/off via other outlets)
compatible_sensors: Mars Hydro temp/humidity sensor (included), PPFD sensor, CO2 sensor, soil moisture sensor (optional, sold separately)
compatible_humidifiers: Mars Hydro 5L/6L humidifiers; any standard AC humidifier via dedicated outlet
compatible_irrigation: any standard AC drip pump via dedicated outlet
compatible_co2_equipment: any standard AC CO2 device via customizable outlet
supported_manufacturer_series: FC, FC-E, TS, SP3000, SP3000R, ADlite100, iFresh
recommended_use_note: All-in-one alternative to iControl + iHub-4AC: 10 pre-labeled smart AC outlets with built-in environmental controller; standalone unit requiring no additional modules; 6 control modes per outlet (Temperature, Humidity, PPFD, CO2, Timer, Cycle)
uvp_notes: Base unit €85.49; up to €169.99 with sensor bundle add-ons
notes: 10 pre-labeled AC outlets: Light1, Light2, Inline Fan, Clip Fan, Humidifier, Dehumidifier, Drip Irrigation, Heat Mat, Heater, plus 2 customizable outlets. RJ12 ports for sensors and device communication. 6 control modes per outlet. Includes temp/humidity sensor; PPFD, CO2, soil sensors sold separately. WiFi + Bluetooth. MarsPro app. DC 12V powered.
